Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Wow, you've lived in a lot of different places.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Let's see... Ten years ago, your parents—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I'm sorry... I've been so busy, I didn't have time to read this beforehand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I'm Ms. Toriumi. I teach Composition. Welcome to our school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Wait, are you trying to hit on me!? You're a real troublemaker, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}You don't need to know my first name. Don't ask such things of a teacher.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I could've gotten a different response[n]if I had enough {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} to be {f 4 31 1 4 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Have you seen the classroom assignments? You're in 2-F; that's my class.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}But first, we need to go to the auditorium. The Welcoming Ceremony will be starting soon.[n]{f 1 1}
